prompt: Crie uma biblioteca de componentes para um dashboard admin, dark glassmorphism

assertions.name: asks-vibe-or-confirms-style
assertions.description: Confirms dark glassmorphism approach before coding

assertions.name: generates-design-tokens-first
assertions.description: Generates design tokens including glassmorphism properties BEFORE components

assertions.name: glassmorphism-tokens
assertions.description: Tokens include backdrop-filter, glass-bg, glass-border for dark theme

assertions.name: multiple-components
assertions.description: Delivers at least 5 distinct components (Card, Button, Badge, Table, Input)

assertions.name: component-variants
assertions.description: Each component has at least 2 variants or states

assertions.name: consistent-design-language
assertions.description: All components share the same token system

note: Run Skill Creator eval cycle to score assertions
